title: selaginella volkensii
intro: Selaginella volkensii, also known as Resurrection Plant, is a type of resurrection fern that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical East Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Selaginella volkensii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Selaginella volkensii are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
